//: Sample response of GET /modules/ui/nav — the shell's cross-module navigation, built purely from active plugins' manifests (no core code, no customer branching). Sections are ordered by name (Ordinal; screens declaring no section group under an empty name that sorts first). Within a section, items are ordered by declared order, then title, then owning module. Each item carries the manifest key of the module that owns it so the shell can lazy-load the component from that module's bundle and gate it by requiredPermission.
